title: Indawo yengxoxo
lead: Lena yindawo yengxoxo. Xhuma izinqubo zakho zengxoxo ze-AI kanye nezakhi zokuxhumana nomsebenzisi (UI) kuleli khasi.
transcriptPlaceholder: Irekhodi lengxoxo lizovela lapha. Bonisa imiyalezo evela kumodeli nasemsebenzini womsebenzisi ngaphakathi kwesiqukathi esinokuskroleka, ungayihlukanisa nangemijikelezo yengxoxo uma uthanda.
emptyState: Qala ingxoxo. Umlando wakho uhlala kulesi siphequluli.
anonBanner: Usufinyelele umkhawulo wokungaziwa. Bhalisa ukuze uthole isabelo samahhala.
rateLimited: Izicelo zivinjelwe okwesikhashana — linda kancane bese uzama futhi.
needsKey: Dala ukhiye we-API bese umnika amandla engxoxweni ukuze uthumele njengawe.
